g.title: PICO_AUDIO_LCD
g.text: GP9-GP11 stay reserved for I2S audio.

g.title: LCD_BACKLIGHT
g.text: LEDA should include an inline ~220 Ohm series resistor if the module does not already provide one.

g.title: PICO_CTRL_SENSOR
g.text: ECHO must be reduced to 3.3 V before GP15.

g.title: US1
g.text: 2 cm to 4 m, about 15 mA, 10 us trigger pulse, mounted on the motor and sensor Pico.
